case_summary: Complainant alleges that she was beaten by accused and her tooth was broken. She claims that she was not provided with proper response or action by the police, specifically by officer Priyanka Man, who allegedly took her thumb impression on blank papers without explanation and threatened her.

sections.title: Cruelty by Husband or Relatives
sections.description: Whoever, being the husband or relative of husband of a woman, subjects such woman to cruelty shall be punished...

sections.title: Voluntarily causing hurt
sections.description: Whoever, except in the case provided for by section 334, voluntarily causes hurt, shall be punished...

evidence_checklist: Seize medical records of the complainant
Record statement of the complainant and witnesses
Investigate the allegations of threat and intimidation by the police officer
io_warnings: Ensure that the FIR is registered promptly and properly as per BNSS Sec 173
Be cautious of potential misconduct by police officers and ensure that the investigation is fair and impartial
